github.boundary: Repository, pull-request, Actions, and security evidence. Exact branch, commit, and approval state remain mandatory for writes.

context7.boundary: Current public library documentation only; never runtime or release proof.

supabase.boundary: Control Room project-scoped read-only inspection by default. DDL remains migration-first and separately approved.

cloudflare-builds.boundary: Read build evidence only. Deployment is a separate approval gate.

cloudflare-observability.boundary: Read minimized operational telemetry only; do not copy raw sensitive payloads.

figma.boundary: Canonical design creation, inspection, and implementation handoff only. Figma cannot authorize code changes, migrations, integration, deployment, spending, or external action.
